title: AGEL-Comp: A Neuro-Symbolic Framework for Compositional Generalization in Interactive Agents
what_happened: arXiv:2604.26522v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large Language Model (LLM)-based agents exhibit systemic failures in compositional generalization, limiting their robustness in interactive environments. This work introduces AGEL-Comp, a neuro-symbolic AI agent architecture designed to address this challenge by grounding actions of the agent. AGEL-Co

title: Granite 4.1 LLMs: How They’re Built
what_happened: Hugging Face Blog announced 'Granite 4.1 LLMs: How They’re Built', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.

title: With Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, Nvidia reveals what really goes into a modern multimodal model
what_happened: Nvidia releases Nemotron 3 Nano Omni, an open multimodal model for text, image, video and audio. Not only the performance is exciting, but also a look at the training data: it comes from Qwen, GPT-OSS, Kimi and DeepSeek OCR, among others. what_happened: Hugging Face Blog announced 'AI evals are becoming the new compute bottleneck', highlighting new developments relevant to AI researchers and practitioners.

title: OpenAI researchers explain why math is the road to AGI
what_happened: AI models have jumped from grade-school arithmetic to olympiad-level and research mathematics in only two years. In the OpenAI Podcast, OpenAI researchers Sebastian Bubeck and Ernest Ryu explain why math has become the key test on the road to artificial general intelligence. The article OpenAI researchers explain why math is the road to AGI appeare
